name: Budapest Karate Akadémia
description: One of Budapest's premier karate academies, offering training for all ages and skill levels in traditional Shotokan and sport karate.

name: Fight Club Budapest
description: A top-tier MMA gym with professional coaches in BJJ, boxing, and mixed martial arts. Home to several Hungarian national champions.

name: Muay Thai Budapest
description: The leading Muay Thai gym in Hungary, with certified instructors trained in Thailand. Classes for beginners through advanced fighters.

name: BJJ Factory Budapest
description: Dedicated Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu academy affiliated with a Gracie-certified school. Open mat sessions every weekend.

name: Budokan Martial Arts Center
description: A large martial arts complex combining traditional Karate with modern MMA training. Features a dedicated ring and mat area.

name: Iron Fist Boxing Gym
description: Classic boxing gym in central Budapest with a rich history. Offers amateur and professional boxing training programs.

name: Tiger Muay Thai & BJJ Budapest
description: An affiliate of the world-famous Tiger Muay Thai camp in Phuket. Offers Muay Thai and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu under expert guidance.

name: Warriors MMA Club
description: A well-rounded MMA facility offering boxing, Muay Thai, and mixed martial arts coaching. Hosts regular sparring events.

name: Kyokushin Budapest
description: Specializing in Kyokushin full-contact karate, this dojo develops discipline, strength, and fighting spirit.

name: Octagon Fight Center
description: A dedicated combat sports facility with a full-size octagon cage. Professional-level training for serious competitors.

name: Sparta Boxing Academy
description: Youth-focused boxing academy producing regional and national champions. Programs available for ages 8 and up.

name: Cobra BJJ & Submission Wrestling
description: Focuses exclusively on BJJ and submission grappling. Small class sizes ensure personalized coaching.

name: Ferencváros Küzdősport Klub
description: A community-based sports club in the heart of Ferencváros, offering boxing, karate, and MMA for locals of all backgrounds.

name: Buda Combat Sports
description: Buda's go-to gym for Muay Thai and MMA. Emphasizes fitness and self-defense alongside competitive training.

name: Grappling House
description: Premier grappling facility offering BJJ and wrestling-based MMA. Home of the Budapest Grappling Open tournament.

name: Angyalföld Boxing Club
description: A storied boxing club in District XIII with over 40 years of history producing Olympic-level talent.

name: Zuglói Karate Dojo
description: Traditional Shotokan karate dojo in Zugló. Great for families and children, with a structured grading system.

name: Kelenföld Fight Academy
description: A modern facility in south-west Buda offering Muay Thai, BJJ, and boxing classes throughout the day.

name: Óbuda Martial Arts Club
description: A friendly dojo in Óbuda teaching Karate and BJJ to children and adults. Strong focus on respect and discipline.

name: Pesterzsébet Fight Gym
description: Affordable MMA and boxing gym in District XX. Open evenings and weekends for working professionals.

name: Champion Muay Thai Gym
description: Established by a former Thai boxing champion, this gym offers authentic Muay Thai conditioning and technique classes.

name: Újpest Küzdősport
description: Versatile martial arts school in District IV, known for its passionate community and dedicated coaching staff.

name: Ground Zero BJJ Academy
description: A pure BJJ academy with black belt instructors and competitive teams at the national and international level.

name: Kispest Combat Club
description: A full-service combat sports club in District XIX offering boxing, Muay Thai, and MMA to competitors and fitness enthusiasts.

name: Pasarét Karate & Fitness
description: A welcoming karate school in the hills of Buda, combining traditional martial arts with modern fitness methods.

name: Józsefváros MMA Factory
description: A no-nonsense MMA gym in District VIII with a reputation for producing serious fighters. Daily open mat included with membership.

name: Budapest Muay Thai Center
description: Specializing in Muay Thai and MMA crossover training. Weekly seminars by visiting instructors from Thailand and the US.
